senses.gloss: who does things or realizes them; effecting

examples.text: وَهُوَ الْغَفُورُ الْوَدُودُ / ذُو الْعَرْشِ الْمَجِيدُ / فَعَّالٌ لِّمَا يُرِيدُ
examples.english: And He is the Most-Forgiving, the Most-Loving, / Of the Throne, the Glorious, / Effecting what He wills.

senses.gloss: that causes effects; affecting; active; effective; effectual; efficacious
